hadiths.arabic: إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى
hadiths.english: Actions are but by intentions, and every man shall have only that which he intended.

hadiths.arabic: بُنِيَ الْإِسْلَامُ عَلَى خَمْسٍ: شَهَادَةِ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ، وَإِقَامِ الصَّلَاةِ، وَإِيتَاءِ الزَّكَاةِ، وَالْحَجِّ، وَصَوْمِ رَمَضَانَ
hadiths.english: Islam is built upon five: testifying that there is no god but Allah and that Muhammad is His Messenger, establishing prayer, paying zakat, performing Hajj, and fasting in Ramadan.

hadiths.arabic: أَنْ تَعْبُدَ اللَّهَ كَأَنَّكَ تَرَاهُ، فَإِنْ لَمْ تَكُنْ تَرَاهُ فَإِنَّهُ يَرَاكَ
hadiths.english: Ihsan is to worship Allah as though you see Him, and if you cannot see Him, then He certainly sees you.

hadiths.arabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى يُحِبَّ لِأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ
hadiths.english: None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself.

hadiths.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
hadiths.english: The Muslim is the one from whose tongue and hand the Muslims are safe.

hadiths.arabic: لَيْسَ مِنَّا مَنْ لَمْ يَرْحَمْ صَغِيرَنَا وَيُوَقِّرْ كَبِيرَنَا
hadiths.english: He is not one of us who does not show mercy to our young and respect to our elders.

hadiths.arabic: إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يَنْظُرُ إِلَى أَجْسَامِكُمْ وَلَا إِلَى صُوَرِكُمْ، وَلَكِنْ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى قُلُوبِكُمْ وَأَعْمَالِكُمْ
hadiths.english: Verily, Allah does not look at your appearance or wealth, but rather He looks at your hearts and actions.

hadiths.arabic: عَلَيْكُمْ بِالصِّدْقِ، فَإِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ، وَإِنَّ الْبِرَّ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ
hadiths.english: Truthfulness leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise.

hadiths.arabic: النِّكَاحُ مِنْ سُنَّتِي، فَمَنْ لَمْ يَعْمَلْ بِسُنَّتِي فَلَيْسَ مِنِّي
hadiths.english: Marriage is part of my Sunnah, and whoever does not follow my Sunnah is not of me.

hadiths.arabic: مَنْ نَفَّسَ عَنْ مُؤْمِنٍ كُرْبَةً مِنْ كُرَبِ الدُّنْيَا، نَفَّسَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ كُرْبَةً مِنْ كُرَبِ يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ
hadiths.english: Whoever relieves a believer's distress in this world, Allah will relieve his distress on the Day of Resurrection.

hadiths.arabic: مَا نَقَصَتْ صَدَقَةٌ مِنْ مَالٍ
hadiths.english: Charity does not decrease wealth.

hadiths.arabic: رَغِمَ أَنْفُ، ثُمَّ رَغِمَ أَنْفُ، ثُمَّ رَغِمَ أَنْفُ مَنْ أَدْرَكَ أَبَوَيْهِ عِنْدَ الْكِبَرِ، أَحَدَهُمَا أَوْ كِلَيْهِمَا، فَلَمْ يَدْخُلِ الْجَنَّةَ
hadiths.english: May he be humbled — he who finds his parents in old age, one or both of them, and does not enter Paradise.

hadiths.arabic: اتَّقِ اللَّهَ حَيْثُمَا كُنْتَ، وَأَتْبِعِ السَّيِّئَةَ الْحَسَنَةَ تَمْحُهَا، وَخَالِقِ النَّاسَ بِخُلُقٍ حَسَنٍ
hadiths.english: Fear Allah wherever you are, follow up a bad deed with a good one to wipe it out, and treat people with good character.

hadiths.arabic: إِنَّ اللَّهَ قَالَ: مَنْ عَادَى لِي وَلِيًّا فَقَدْ آذَنْتُهُ بِالْحَرْبِ
hadiths.english: Allah said: Whoever shows enmity to a friend of Mine, I declare war upon him.

hadiths.arabic: الطُّهُورُ شَطْرُ الْإِيمَانِ
hadiths.english: Cleanliness is half of faith.

hadiths.arabic: أَيُّ الْعَمَلِ أَحَبُّ إِلَى اللَّهِ؟ قَالَ: الصَّلَاةُ عَلَى وَقْتِهَا
hadiths.english: I asked the Prophet ﷺ which deed is most beloved to Allah. He said: Prayer at its proper time.

hadiths.arabic: الْمُسَافِرُ وَمَالُهُ عَلَى قَلَتٍ إِلَّا مَا وَقَى اللَّهُ
hadiths.english: The traveler and his wealth are at risk except for what Allah protects.

hadiths.arabic: إِذَا مَاتَ الْإِنْسَانُ انْقَطَعَ عَنْهُ عَمَلُهُ إِلَّا مِنْ ثَلَاثَةٍ: صَدَقَةٍ جَارِيَةٍ، أَوْ عِلْمٍ يُنْتَفَعُ بِهِ، أَوْ وَلَدٍ صَالِحٍ يَدْعُو لَهُ
hadiths.english: When a person dies, his deeds cease except for three: a continuing charity, beneficial knowledge, or a righteous child who prays for him.

hadiths.arabic: دَعْ مَا يَرِيبُكَ إِلَى مَا لَا يَرِيبُكَ
hadiths.english: Leave what makes you doubt for what does not make you doubt.

hadiths.arabic: إِنَّ الدِّينَ يُسْرٌ، وَلَنْ يُشَادَّ الدِّينَ أَحَدٌ إِلَّا غَلَبَهُ
hadiths.english: Religion is ease, and whoever makes the religion too hard upon himself will be overwhelmed by it.

hadiths.arabic: طَلَبُ الْعِلْمِ فَرِيضَةٌ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ
hadiths.english: Seeking knowledge is an obligation upon every Muslim.

hadiths.arabic: إِنَّ اللَّهَ أَوْحَى إِلَيَّ أَنْ تَوَاضَعُوا حَتَّى لَا يَفْخَرَ أَحَدٌ عَلَى أَحَدٍ
hadiths.english: Allah has revealed to me that you should be humble, so that no one wrongs another or boasts over another.

hadiths.arabic: سَبْعَةٌ يُظِلُّهُمُ اللَّهُ فِي ظِلِّهِ يَوْمَ لَا ظِلَّ إِلَّا ظِلُّهُ: إِمَامٌ عَادِلٌ، وَشَابٌّ نَشَأَ فِي عِبَادَةِ اللَّهِ
hadiths.english: Seven are those whom Allah will shade on the Day when there is no shade but His: a just ruler, a youth who grew up in the worship of Allah...

hadiths.arabic: حُبِّبَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ دُنْيَاكُمُ النِّسَاءُ وَالطِّيبُ، وَجُعِلَتْ قُرَّةُ عَيْنِي فِي الصَّلَاةِ
hadiths.english: Made beloved to me from your world are women and perfume, and the comfort of my eyes has been placed in prayer.

hadiths.arabic: بُعِثْتُ لِأُتَمِّمَ مَكَارِمَ الْأَخْلَاقِ
hadiths.english: I have been sent only to perfect noble character.

hadiths.arabic: إِنَّ مِنْ خِيَارِكُمْ أَحْسَنَكُمْ أَخْلَاقًا
hadiths.english: The best among you are those who have the best character.

hadiths.arabic: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
hadiths.english: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should speak good or remain silent.

hadiths.arabic: لَا يَتَمَنَّيَنَّ أَحَدُكُمُ الْمَوْتَ مِنْ ضُرٍّ أَصَابَهُ
hadiths.english: Let none of you wish for death because of a hardship that has befallen him.

hadiths.arabic: مَا يُصِيبُ الْمُسْلِمَ مِنْ نَصَبٍ وَلَا وَصَبٍ وَلَا هَمٍّ وَلَا حُزْنٍ إِلَّا كَفَّرَ اللَّهُ بِهَا مِنْ خَطَايَاهُ
hadiths.english: No fatigue, illness, anxiety, or sorrow afflicts a Muslim except that Allah expiates by it some of his sins.

hadiths.arabic: احْفَظِ اللَّهَ يَحْفَظْكَ، احْفَظِ اللَّهَ تَجِدْهُ تُجَاهَكَ
hadiths.english: Be mindful of Allah and He will protect you. Be mindful of Allah and you will find Him before you.
